subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Ancient Beloved, Whose glances of favor have ever been directed towards His friends, ceasing not for a moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب قدم را که لازال لحظات الطافش بسوی دوستان خود بوده و آنی
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
